name: alex-harness
description: Personal SDLC harness — /helix is the only entrypoint, orchestrating a1-a8 + code-review + meta-audit phases under a Ralph passes contract. v0.8 completes Ralph (failure log + SOUL inject + task_card hash lock), adds OTLP exporter + grep repo-map + dogfood suite, drops a3-retriever and mode-router-coarse from default chain.
